message:
fix(ffs-fuse): reject FS_IOC_GET_ENCRYPTION_POLICY_EX when v2 exceeds out_size (bd-mk94k)

The ioctl handler previously only checked if the caller's out_size was
sufficient for a v1 policy (header + 12 bytes). For v2 policies (24 bytes),
it would return the full payload regardless of the caller's buffer capacity.

Now the handler checks the actual policy size against out_size AFTER
retrieving the policy from the backend, returning ERANGE if the buffer
is insufficient for the actual policy version.

Added regression test:
- dispatch_ioctl_get_encryption_policy_ex_v2_rejects_v1_sized_buffer

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
